name: shortform-idea-engine
description: Turn competitor short-form videos into ranked, brand-fit video ideas and scripts. Discovers outlier videos, decodes why they work, remixes them against a brand profile, ranks them, and scripts the top picks.

interface.shortDescription: Generate ranked short-form video ideas and scripts
interface.longDescription: Short-Form Idea Engine turns competitor short-form videos into ranked, brand-fit video ideas and production-ready scripts through a six-skill research, decoding, remixing, ranking, and writing workflow.
defaultPrompt: Turn competitor videos into ranked script ideas
Decode this short-form video for hooks
Write scripts from approved short-form ideas
